images.alt: Monochrome close-up of a curly-haired person with glitter under the eyes and a nose ring, above bold coral SCHIBSTED GROTESK lettering on black with small credit labels.
Salmon-pink and black typographic layout of overlapping tilted posters with fragmented MNCHRM and MVFWRD lettering and labels like brutal, uncompromising contrast, grayscale archive.
